_doc: Sonic signatures for Grok native AV — pairs with visual style_* and hybrid_* IDs
_engine: Grok Imagine / Aurora — synchronized audio in-pass (dialogue, lip-sync, SFX, ambient, music)
_chain_rule: Continue from the attached previous audio tail + final video frame for perfect sync and evolution.

sound_designers.name: Walter Murch
sound_designers.signature: worldizing, subtractive mix, sound equals picture, inner psychology through layers

sound_designers.name: Ren Klyce
sound_designers.signature: clinical precision, unsettling ambiences, hyper-real psychological foley

sound_designers.name: Ben Burtt
sound_designers.signature: iconic invented sounds from found objects

sound_designers.name: Skip Lievsay
sound_designers.signature: sparse impactful mix, silence and environment breathe

sonic_signatures.name: Fincher/Khondji Sonic
sonic_signatures.description: Precise cold layered dread. Clinical foley, low-frequency hums, subtractive mix where ambient suddenly drops.
sonic_signatures.chain_prompt: Continue from previous audio tail + attached final frame. Fincher/Khondji sonic: hyper-precise foley with subtle digital glitches in the silence, cold metallic echoes, desaturated ambience that feels calculated and unresolved. Evolve tension organically.

sonic_signatures.name: Anderson/Yeoman Sonic
sonic_signatures.description: Whimsical precision, symmetrical sound design. Ticking metronome motifs, curated quirky foley, balanced musical stings.
sonic_signatures.chain_prompt: Maintain whimsical precision from previous audio, add symmetrical sound motifs that match visual symmetry on the reference frame.

sonic_signatures.name: Coppola/Willis Sonic
sonic_signatures.description: Operatic shadow-like layers. Deep rumbling bass, warm intimate dialogue, echoing silences, selective chiaroscuro reveal.
sonic_signatures.chain_prompt: Evolve from previous audio with inherited shadows in the soundscape — warm tones fading into deep rumbling power.

sonic_signatures.name: Deakins Sonic
sonic_signatures.description: Hyper-real environmental immersion. Practical location foley, volumetric wind/haze, space breathes naturally.
sonic_signatures.chain_prompt: Continue Deakins-style practical ambient from previous tail, match lighting/environment on reference frame with authentic location textures.

sonic_signatures.name: Bergman/Nykvist Sonic
sonic_signatures.description: Intimate psychological minimalism. Soft breaths, ticking clocks, distant bells, near-silence, voice as emotional close-up.
sonic_signatures.chain_prompt: Intimate Nykvist sonic continuation — minimal layers focused on voice and micro-sounds that reveal inner state, reference the final frame face lighting.

sonic_signatures.name: Storaro/Bertolucci Sonic
sonic_signatures.description: Symbolic color-equivalent audio. Warm/cool tonal shifts, dramatic swells mirroring color psychology, sensual layered textures.
sonic_signatures.chain_prompt: Storaro sonic evolution — color palette of sound shifts psychologically from previous block's tail.

sonic_signatures.name: Cuarón/Lubezki Sonic
sonic_signatures.description: Immersive fluid experiential layers. Organic spatial audio, natural wind/particle sounds, lived-in dialogue.
sonic_signatures.chain_prompt: Seamless Lubezki audio continuation — fluid spatial layers that feel like one long experiential take from the reference frame.

blended_sound_bible: Full cinematic audio design synthesizing the 7 masters: precise clinical foley and psychological undercurrents (Fincher/Klyce), whimsical balanced motifs (Anderson), operatic shadow layers (Coppola/Murch), hyper-real practical environmental textures (Deakins), intimate minimal soul sounds (Bergman), symbolic emotional tonal shifts (Storaro), and immersive unbroken experiential flow (Cuarón). Generate synchronized dialogue with natural lip-sync performance, organic SFX, evolving ambience, and subtle score that reacts to visual style. Continue perfectly from previous audio tail and attached video frame.

python_assembly: Single native AV API call when dialogue required
Post-stitch EQ/volume automation across xfade joins
